document.name: Berényi Étterem
document.shortDescription: Garden restaurant by Móricz körtér — Hungarian seasonal menu and terrace on Berényi utca.
document.longDescription:
Berényi Étterem on Berényi utca offers seasonal Hungarian plates in a villa garden walking distance from Móricz Zsigmond körtér. Sunday lunch and wine tastings fill the terrace. Reserve on berenyi.hu.

Sources: https://www.berenyi.hu/
